name: TF Bank AB (publ)
summary: TF Bank AB (publ) provides consumer banking services and e-commerce solutions through a proprietary IT platform. The company operates in three segments: Consumer Lending, E-commerce Solutions, and Credit Cards. It offers savings accounts and unsecured consumer loans, as well as credit cards. The company also provides digital payment solutions for brick-and-mortar retailers and online retailers. It serves in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, Germany, and Austria. TF Bank AB (publ) was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Bor√É¬•s, Sweden.
